description.value:
No matter the dangers posed to your person, you've always prioritized the safety of your allies over your own wellbeing. Whenever you Raise a Shield or position a weapon with the parry trait defensively, you can choose to increase the AC of up to two adjacent allies instead of your own. If you have the Stretching Reach feat, increase the effective range of your protection by 5 feet. As long as the selected allies remain within your reach and your shield is raised, they gain the circumstance bonus to AC from your shield or weapon, while you take a –1 circumstance penalty to AC while concentrating on the defense of those around you.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.Effect: Protective Bulk]

Special If you have the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Shield Block] feat, during this time, you can trigger Shield Block when you have your shield raised and one of the selected allies would take damage from a physical attack, but you can't use Shield Block to protect yourself.
